rulings.Case Title: RUDY MARTIN VS. CHASE BANK, N.A., DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank Nas Notice Of Motion For Vexatious Litigant Determination
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 07, 2022, line 1. 2-DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Vexatious Litigant Determination. Continued to March 14, 2022 on Court's own motion. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ACCESS CAPITAL INVESTMENTS FUND TWO, LP VS. MATTHIAS RICHARD MEDERER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 07, 2022, line 2. 2-DEFENDANT MATTHIAS MEDERER's FINANCIAL DISTRESS DECLARATION. DENIED. The unlawful detainer complaint is not based on nonpayment of rent. Therefore, CCP 1179.03(h) is inapplicable. The Declaration was also filed untimely, as it must be filed within 5 days of when the summons and legal papers are served on Defendant. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ACCESS CAPITAL INVESTMENTS FUND TWO, LP VS. MATTHIAS RICHARD MEDERER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 07, 2022, line 2. 4-DEFENDANT KRISTEN BARTOK's HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION. DENIED. Ms. Bartok previously brought Claim of right to Possession which was denied on November 5, 2021. Therefore, this application should be a Motion for Reconsideration, and as such it is untimely under CCP 1008. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: ALMA A. CAMPOS VS. MANUEL MORALES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 07, 2022, line 8. DEFENDANT MANUEL MORALES, JUAN MORALES, MANUEL RAXULEU's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support a claim for unlawful detainer under SFRO section 37.9(a)(7). In their Notice of Termination of Tenancy, Plaintiff provided a copy of the original lease between Plaintiff and Ms. Vides that support their claim that Defendants are unauthorized subtenants holding over at the end of said lease. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
